title: An Offer Made in Shadows
description: Your reputation has reached people who prefer feared associates. A masked envoy offers profitable work precisely because respectable heroes would refuse it.

options.title: Accept the Work
options.description: If the realm already distrusts you, its rules offer little protection.

options.title: Expose the Envoy
options.description: Use the offer to prove the rumors about you wrong.

options.title: Demand More
options.description: A dangerous reputation should command a dangerous price.
